rulings.Case Title: ROCHELLE VAUGHN et al VS. WALTER WORSHAM
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Plaintiffs Motion To (1) Deem Requests For Admissions To Walter Worsham As An Individual Admitted; (2) Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories To Walter Worsham As An Individual (Set Three), Supplemental Interrogatory To Walter Worsham As An Individual (Set One); Supplemental Requests For Production Of Documents To Walter Worsham As An Individual (Set One); And (3) For The Award Of Monetary Sanctions.
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, April 18, 2016, line 1. PLAINTIFF ROCHELLE VAUGHN, MIGUEL WASHINGTON, REYNA WASHINGTON's Motion To (1) Deem Requests For Admissions To Walter Worsham As An Individual Admitted; (2) Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories To Walter Worsham As An Individual (Set Three), Supplemental Interrogatory To Walter Worsham As An Individual (Set One); Supplemental Requests For Production Of Documents To Walter Worsham As An Individual (Set One); And (3) For The Award Of Monetary Sanctions. GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion is denied as to the request to deem admissions admitted. Motion is otherwise GRANTED. Complete verified responses shall be provided within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Sanctions granted in the amount of $746. = (501/REQ)
